title: SGDK Common Artifact Envelope
description: Base schema for all artifacts generated by the AAA agent ecosystem. Every new JSON artifact must include these fields.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the artifact schema

tool_name.description: Name of the tool that generated this artifact

tool_version.description: Semantic version of the generating tool

project_root.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

workspace_root.description: Absolute path to the MegaDrive_DEV workspace root

failure_reason.description: Human-readable failure reason, null when status is ok
